name: starrocks-dev
description: Drive a remote StarRocks dev host over SSH. Ten skills: sr-connect (SSH/dev-env setup + verify; profiles for parallel work and for second dev hosts reached through the main one as a jump), sr-build (compile FE/BE), sr-test (FE/BE/regression tests), sr-deploy (deploy + start/stop cluster, auto-ports), sr-diagnose (locate/reproduce a crash from a stack trace), sr-inspect (connect to a live cluster through the dev host and inspect perf/correctness), sr-rollout (full-replace a live cluster's binaries with a worktree profile's build, OS-matched, node by node, optionally parallel BEs), sr-backport (cherry-pick a merged PR onto a release branch, resolve conflicts, and verify on the branch-matching dev-env image), sr-bench (a named registry of benchmark/test clusters reached through a jump host with shared env-var credentials, plus wake to start suspended FE/BE), sr-scan (statically scan a module/flow for bugs, then reproduce confirmed ones via SQLTest/failpoint/strace/eBPF/kernel fault injection and record them to markdown).
